title: cymbopogon refractus
intro: Cymbopogon refractus, also known as red grass or weeping grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is native to Australia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cymbopogon refractus include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of bronchitis and other respiratory issues. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as tea, essential oil, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and well-being.
